---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ServerGuard
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of the problem. (e.g., "I want to be notified on Discord but there's no Discord notifier...")

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature and in what scenario?

## Additional Context

Links, references, or mockups if applicable.
